'''鈭歾h-m-dh-l''' ('''kazhamdheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alacrify|alacrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alacrify|alacrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-m-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazhamdheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhamdheloko|thizhamdheloko]] || [[word:jizhamdheloko|jizhamdheloko]] || [[word:shizhamdheloko|shizhamdheloko]] || [[word:kizhamdheloko|kizhamdheloko]]
